svg.aria-label: Decision tree: if your orchestration branches deeply and needs full replay and versioning, spans several languages, or needs signals, queries and child workflows, pick a workflow engine; otherwise pick a database-backed scheduler like JobRunr

text.font-family: Satoshi, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
